2606.03866.title: Taiji: Pareto Optimal Policy Optimization with Semantics-IDs Trade-off for Industrial LLM-Enhanced Recommendation
2606.03866.paper_summary: Scaling recommender systems via large language models (LLMs) has become a prominent trend in the industry. However, aligning the LLM's semantic space with the recommender's ID space via post-training (e.g., SFT and RL) remains challenging. Existing LLM4Rec paradigms are bottlenecked by two main issues: (1) the difficulty of measuring and improving chain-of-thought (CoT) quality in open-domain recommendation during SFT, and (2) the neglect of the trade-off between LLM semantic rewards and recommendation preference rewards during RL alignment. Inspired by these challenges, we present Taiji, a novel LLM-as-Enhancer framework designed for industrial recommender systems. To overcome the SFT bottleneck, we utilize reverse-engineered reasoning and open-ended rejection sampling to generate high-quality, domain-specific CoT data. To resolve the RL alignment issue, we propose Pareto Optimal Policy Optimization (POPO), which adaptively adjusts cross-domain reward weights. Theoretically, it achieves an optimal trade-off between the semantic world knowledge of LLMs and the collaborative ID features representing online user preferences. Extensive offline evaluations and online A/B tests validate the effectiveness of Taiji. Deployed on Kuaishou's advertising platform since May 2026, Taiji currently serves over 400 million users daily, yielding significant commercial revenue and demonstrating its robust scalability in web-scale environments.
2606.03866.paper_summary_zh: 擴展推薦系統通過大型語言模型（LLMs）已成為業界的一個顯著趨勢。<lb/>然而，通過後期訓練（例如，SFT 和 RL）將 LLM 的語義空間與推薦系統的 ID 空間對齊仍然具有挑戰性。<lb/>現有的 LLM4Rec 範式受到兩個主要問題的瓶頸： (1) 在 SFT 過程中，測量和改善開放領域推薦中的思維鏈（CoT）質量的困難，以及 (2) 在 RL 對齊過程中忽略 LLM 語義獎勵與推薦偏好獎勵之間的權衡。<lb/>受到這些挑戰的啟發，我們提出了 Taiji，一個為工業推薦系統設計的新型 LLM 作為增強器框架。<lb/>為了克服 SFT 瓶頸，我們利用反向工程推理和開放式拒絕取樣來生成高質量的領域特定 CoT 數據。<lb/>為了解決 RL 對齊問題，我們提出了帕累托最優政策優化（POPO），它自適應地調整跨領域獎勵權重。<lb/>理論上，它在 LLM 的語義世界知識和代表在線用戶偏好的協作 ID 特徵之間實現了最佳權衡。<lb/>廣泛的離線評估和在線 A/B 測試驗證了 Taiji 的有效性。<lb/>自 2026 年 5 月以來，Taiji 已在快手的廣告平台上部署，目前每天為超過 4 億用戶提供服務，產生了可觀的商業收入，並展示了其在網絡規模環境中的強大擴展性。
2606.03866.author: Yuecheng Li et.al.
2606.03866.authors: Yuecheng Li, Zeyu Song, Jing Yao, Chi Lu, Peng Jiang, Kun Gai
